titleStmt.title: SII 8.339: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 339. (A.R. No. 64 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .. tribhuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ śrīrācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟ
ṟa coti nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvu ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷu
kku vaṭakarai rācarācavaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟuk kuṟaippaṟṟu Icaṇaikkuṟaik kāṇiuṭaiya kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ A
ṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom puṉcey nila vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttaparicāvatu . Icaṇai
kkuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṉṟa nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Ūṟpotu talattuṟai mukkālnilattu
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Ūṟpotu Amaṇkuṭaiyāṉ taṭinilat
tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa taṭi nilam
Iraṇṭiṉāl 1 + 2 + 1/20 + 1/320 Innilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā munātirikaiyum Iṟṟaiṉāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmi
licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 1000 2 100 6 Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟṟāṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik
kaiccela vaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkuk kaḻaṉi
vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom . Iṉṉilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum
Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟ ṟāṟume vilaiyāvutākavum . Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai yāvutākavum I
tuvallatu veṟu porumāvaṟuti poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallātatākavum . Iṉṉilattu meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ
kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṉaikaḷum potuvum potāriyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa mikutikkuṟai vu
ḷḷaṭaṅka nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumā muntirikaikkum Ivarkaḷ veṇṭiṉapote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum . kuṭu
ttilomākil Inta puṉcey pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu pramāṇamāvutākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaik kaṟa viṟṟup poru ḷaṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvarate
va kaṉmikaḷukku kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum Ivviruvom . Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḻaṉi
vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivvūr Ūrkaṇakku vaṭakuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku koṭṭuṭaiyā
The record is incomplete by a few letters at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.339 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
